title: Question: internal error when calling AstSel->lsbConst()
body:
---


Author Name: **Jie Xu** (@jiexu)
Original Redmine Message: 1486 from https://www.veripool.org



---

The current code reads:
```
     int         widthConst() const { return widthp()->castConst()->toSInt(); }
     int         lsbConst()   const { return lsbp()->castConst()->toSInt(); }
     int         msbConst()   const { return lsbConst()+widthConst()-1; }

```

which will cause internal error if the @castConst()@ is returning NULL.
